title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: microcode_ctl bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for microcode_ctl is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The microcode_ctl packages provide microcode updates for Intel and AMD processors.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): [RHEL 10.0.z] Update Intel CPU microcode to the latest version (JIRA:RHEL-111080)  Update microcode_ctl to latest upstream [rhel-10.0.z] (JIRA:RHEL-96912)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 - 4 years of updates 10 x86_64

fixes.description: [RHEL 10.0.z] Update Intel CPU microcode to the latest version

full_text:
An update for microcode_ctl is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The microcode_ctl packages provide microcode updates for Intel and AMD processors.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): [RHEL 10.0.z] Update Intel CPU microcode to the latest version (JIRA:RHEL-111080)  Update microcode_ctl to latest upstream [rhel-10.0.z] (JIRA:RHEL-96912)
